tool_name: Bolted Flange Joint Integrity — Gasket Seating Stress, Bolt Load & Leak Tightness Class

inputs.name: Internal Design Pressure (P_d)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 §4 — Design specification nominal, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Gasket Material Factor (m)
inputs.note: ASME VIII App 2 Table 2-5.1: spiral-wound SS/graphite m=3.0, full-face rubber m=0.5

inputs.name: Minimum Gasket Seating Stress (y)
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

inputs.name: Number of Bolts (n_b)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Bolt Material Yield Strength (S_y)
inputs.note: ASTM A193 B7: S_y=724 MPa at ambient
inputs.uncertainty_source: JCSS PMC Part 3 §25.2 Table 25.1 — Yield/ultimate strength (steel): CoV=0.07

formulas: N = (gasket_od_mm - gasket_id_mm) / 2; b_eff_mm = (N <= 12.7) ? N/2 : 2.53*Math.sqrt(N/2)   // [mm] Effective Gasket Seating Width (b_eff_mm) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 App.2 §2-5

G_mean_m = gasket_id_mm + 2*b_eff_mm; H_kN = Math.PI/4 * (G_mean_m/1000)^2 * design_pressure_bar * 1e5 / 1000   // [kN] Hydrostatic End Force (H_kN) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII App.2 — hydrostatic load on mean gasket diameter

H_p_kN = 2*Math.PI*G_mean_m*b_eff_mm*1e-3 * gasket_m_factor * design_pressure_bar*1e5/1000; W_op_total_kN = H_kN + H_p_kN   // [kN] Minimum Required Bolt Load — Operating Condition (W_op) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII App.2 Eq.(2)
W_seat_kN = Math.PI * G_mean_m * b_eff_mm*1e-3 * gasket_y_mpa * 1000   // [kN] Minimum Required Bolt Load — Seating Condition (W_seat) Reference: ASME BPVC VIII App.2 Eq.(3)
W_avail_kN = bolt_count * bolt_root_area_mm2 * 1e-6 * bolt_material_yield_mpa * 1000 * 0.7   // [kN] Total Available Bolt Load
bolt_ratio = W_avail_kN / Math.max(W_op_total_kN, W_seat_kN)   // [dimensionless] Bolt Load Adequacy Ratio Reference: EN 1591-1:2013 §7 — ratio ≥ 1.0 required

V1.error_msg: G_OD must exceed G_ID — check gasket dimension inputs

V2.error_msg: Gasket OD cannot exceed flange OD — invalid geometry

V3.error_msg: Available bolt load insufficient — joint will leak or gasket will not seat

smart_warnings.message: Bolt load deficit: add bolts, upgrade bolt grade, or use lower-y gasket per ASME App.2 §2-5
Excessive bolt load: gasket crush risk — verify gasket crush limit per manufacturer data
High-pressure service with low m-factor: soft gasket inadequate — use spiral-wound or ring-type joint
Wide effective seating width: bolt load demand increases sharply — verify torque values per PCC-1-2019
Few bolts at elevated pressure: flange rotation risk — minimum 8 bolts recommended per ASME B16.5
High-strength bolting: stress corrosion cracking susceptibility in H₂S service per NACE MR0175

fmea.effect: G_OD must exceed G_ID — check gasket dimension inputs
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Gasket OD cannot exceed flange OD — invalid geometry
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Available bolt load insufficient — joint will leak or gasket will not seat
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Bolt load deficit: add bolts, upgrade bolt grade, or use lower-y gasket per ASME App.2 §2-5
Excessive bolt load: gasket crush risk — verify gasket crush limit per manufacturer data
High-pressure service with low m-factor: soft gasket inadequate — use spiral-wound or ring-type joint
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: design_pressure_bar > 100 && gasket_m_factor < 2.5

fmea.failureMode: Wide effective seating width: bolt load demand increases sharply — verify torque values per PCC-1-2019
Few bolts at elevated pressure: flange rotation risk — minimum 8 bolts recommended per ASME B16.5
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: bolt_count < 8 && design_pressure_bar > 40

fmea.failureMode: High-strength bolting: stress corrosion cracking susceptibility in H₂S service per NACE MR0175
